projectDescription: A structured preparation system for opening ChatGPT Projects from explicit files and controlled artifacts instead of hidden conversational context.
keyFeatures: Explicit file-based project opening — no reliance on chat memory or conversational carry-over
Four canonical governing files defining scope, rules, artifacts, and protocol
Structured artifact system with defined schemas, write/read triggers, and freshness rules
Two-axis information model: stability classification before residence assignment
Four readiness states: READY, NOT_READY, BLOCKED, CONFLICT
Conservative promotion model preventing local material from becoming system authority
Guided web compiler for browser-based artifact compilation
Domain-agnostic design works for research, product, sports, writing, or technical projects
Smoke test suite for validating system behavior before consequential work
AI_START.md bootstrap file for correct AI session startup
publicApiSurface: 00_SCOPE.md — system identity, scope, and final output definition
01_RULES.md — canonical criteria: stability, residence, validation, promotion, readiness
02_PROTOCOL.md — minimum working procedure and state machine
03_ARTIFACTS.md — artifact grammar, schemas, triggers, and freshness rules
TARGET_PROJECT_BRIEF_ARTIFACT — artifact: objective, scope_in, scope_out, required_outputs, constraints
INITIAL_SSOT_ARTIFACT — artifact: official_materials, approved_sources, base_constraints, version_or_date
HANDOFF_ARTIFACT — artifact: current_state, recent_tests, open_points, next_move
SOURCE_OR_MATERIAL_TRANSFER_ARTIFACT — artifact: candidate_materials, source_type, validation_state, attach_or_review_flag
ENTRY_POINT.md — package startup routing and interpretation surface
Readiness states: READY, NOT_READY, BLOCKED, CONFLICT
Residence classes: CANONICAL, EXTERNAL_ARTIFACT, RUNTIME_OPERATOR_INPUT, DO_NOT_STORE
